emails.subject: New Turn-ons
emails.body: New Turn-ons Tom, Production commenced to flow as stated below; please create a base load ticket in sitara based upon the following information: Counterparty Meter no. Volumes Price Period Union Gas Corp. 9827 3,000mmbtu/d 100% Gas Daily less $0.10 3/9-3/31 Cico Oil Gas Co. 9828 1,200mmbtu/d 100% Gas Daily less $0.095 3/15-3/31 Thanks, vlt x3-6353
